result: If I could change the world in one way, I would make empathy—which includes compassion and genuine curiosity about others’ experiences—a skill every person is taught and encouraged to use daily. When people can truly understand one another, it becomes easier to collaborate, respect differences, and solve problems together. That shift could ripple through nearly every challenge we face, from interpersonal conflicts to global crises.

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
